arts.ttl: Parma double deal: Coulibaly to Leicester, Vogliacco from Genoa
arts.sum: Parma are on the verge of a double deal, selling Woyo Coulibaly to Leicester City...

arts.ttl: Leicester close to sealing transfer as negotiations now ‘in the details’ – Moved ahead of competition
arts.sum: Leicester City are close to sealing a deal for Parma defender Woyo Coulibaly, with the transfer now ‘in the details’. That’s according to journalist Gianluca di Marzio, who reports that Leicester have stolen a march on Fiorentina to secure the 25-year-old right-back. He states that Coulibaly is ‘close to saying goodbye’ to Parma as they The post Leicester close to sealing transfer as negotiations now ‘in the details’ – Moved ahead of competition appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy plans personal bid to keep 'vital part of Leicester City's future'
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy will personally present prodigious 15-year-old winger Jeremy Monga with a pathway to the first team as Leicester City look to retain “a vital part of the future of this club”. But his talent has been noticed “by the whole world”, van Nistelrooy has said, and City face a battle to keep him from moving to one the country’s biggest clubs.

arts.ttl: Leicester City owners launch £2.15bn compensation claim after five killed in helicopter crash
arts.sum: Khun Vichai Srivaddhanaprabha and four others died in a helicopter crash outside the King Power Stadium in October 2018, with the £2.15bn claim alleging that manufacturer Leonardo SpA is liable for his death

arts.ttl: Leicester set for imminent points deduction verdict that could decide relegation fate
arts.sum: Leicester City are already in a fight to retain their Premier League status and they could be hit with a points deduction which would leave them in even greater peril

arts.sum: The transfer window is in full swing with clubs in the Premier League and across Europe seeking deals

arts.ttl: Predicted Leicester City XI v QPR as Patson Daka decision made in Ruud van Nistelrooy balancing act
arts.sum: Patson Daka could replace Jamie Vardy but there may be limited changes made by Ruud van Nistelrooy for Leicester City’s FA Cup third-round tie against QPR. Van Nistelrooy knows he has to balance squad fitness and the need for a confidence-boosting win when the in-form Championship side visit the King Power Stadium on Saturday.
